body:
Bugfixes: * Fix bad Intel Arc GPU name detection, which was supposed to be fixed in the last version but the change was reverted accidentally (#1177, GPU, Linux) * Fix arm32 CPU name detection no longer work. Regression of 2.21.2 (CPU, Linux) ---
